grid.note: 5 reels x 4 rows, 1024 ways-to-win (4^5). Confirmed via paytable page 1 and market research; no fixed paylines exist.

symbols.note: Top premium character symbol; during Free Spins also marks Vault key positions when landing on unmarked cells. 5-of-a-kind pay estimated from market range (~5x).
Premium. Exact figures not transcribed (screenshot-only); estimated from market premium range 3.5x-5x for 5oak.
Premium; pays estimated from market range.
Gold coin premium; pays estimated from market range.
Gold ring premium; pays estimated from market range.
Card royal; low tier 5oak estimated ~2x-3x from market range.
Pyramid Wild. Substitutes for regular symbols; restricted to reels 2, 3 and 4 in the base game (paytable page 1). No independent base-game pay confirmed.

Gold-coin 'WILD x2' symbol appearing only in Free Spins. Carries a x2 multiplier that stacks multiplicatively when multiple wilds join a way (2x/4x/8x...). Own paytable READ from paytable page 2 at $2 bet: 5=$50(25x), 4=$25(12.5x), 3=$10(5x), 2=$1(0.5x) — the one exactly-derived paytable line.

Lotus scatter. 3-scatter base pay of 1x total bet CONFIRMED live ($2.00 win at $2 bet). 4/5 pays (5x/25x) estimated from market research. Triggers 10 Free Spins on 3+ anywhere; in Free Spins also adds 10x/50x/250x to the Vault for 3/4/5.

paytable._note: Only wild_multiplier (from paytable page 2) and scatter-3 (from live play) are exactly derived; all regular-symbol figures are ESTIMATES from market-research ranges (premium 5oak ~3.5x-5x, royals ~2x-3x) because exact per-symbol figures were captured only in paytable screenshots, not transcribed.

math.volatilityNote: In-game paytable page 4 printed 'Medium volatility' but shows a 5/5-bolt badge; splash advertised a 5-bolt rating; market research classifies it medium-to-high. Recorded as medium-high to reflect the in-game contradiction.

features.trigger: 3+ scatter (lotus) symbols anywhere on the reels
features.behavior: Flat award of 10 free spins on a night-temple reel set regardless of 3/4/5 scatters (confirmed across all observed triggers). Wild Multiplier (gold-coin WILD x2) symbols appear and stack multiplicatively (2x/4x/8x...) on ways they join. Special reels raise Cleopatra density to drive the Vault key mechanic. No retrigger observed: 3 scatters landing on a round's final spin added zero spins.

features.trigger: Active throughout the Free Spins round
features.behavior: Vault meter starts at 20x total bet (confirmed: $40 at $2 bet). Eight positions on reels 2-4 are pre-marked with keys at round start; each Cleopatra symbol on an unmarked position adds a key (20 positions total). Wild landings add random increments from a set spanning 1x..12500x; scatters in Free Spins add 10x/50x/250x for 3/4/5. The accumulated Vault pays ONLY if all 20 positions are marked by round end, otherwise it is forfeited (never reached 20/20 across all observed rounds; peak 16/20).

Forces a spin containing exactly 3 scatters, immediately triggering the 10-spin Free Spins round. Cost $60.00 at $2.00 bet / $6.00 at $0.20 bet (confirmed). Buy-feature RTP ~96.56%. Single tier only — no enhanced/super buy option was ever offered across 5+ purchases.

Gold-coin Wild carrying a x2 multiplier applied to any winning way it joins; multiple wilds in the same way multiply together (2x/4x/8x...). Own Free-Spins paytable: 5=25x, 4=12.5x, 3=5x, 2=0.5x total bet. No evidence multipliers carry across spins (no respin mechanic exists).

winTiers.name: MEGA
winTiers.note: Winged-Cleopatra goddess graphic with falling coin particles; the only named win-tier banner observed this session. Other tiers (e.g. Big Win, Super Win, Epic Win) were not observed and remain unconfirmed, NOT confirmed absent.

presentation.backgrounds: Multiple ambient day backgrounds cycle in base game (e.g. bathhouse scene); Free Spins uses a night-temple scene with ambient touches (shooting star). Cinematic Cleopatra portrait transition plays when exiting Free Spins.

ui.controls: Spin (circular arrows), Autoplay, Buy Feature, +/- bet, spin-speed cycle, sound, info/paytable, hamburger menu.
modals: Autoplay Settings (Turbo/Quick Spin mutually exclusive, Skip Screens, autospin slider up to ~1000, Start)
Buy Feature panel ($60 at $2 bet, confirm/cancel)
System Settings (Battery Saver, Ambient Music, Sound FX, Intro Screen, Game History, Total Bet)
Bet Multiplier 20x panel (Bet / Coin Value / Total Bet steppers, Bet Max)
ui.shortcuts: HOLD SPACE FOR TURBO SPIN (no persistent turbo toggle).

assets.bg: cycling Egyptian ambient backgrounds (day bathhouse / night temple in Free Spins)

estimationMethod.math.baseRTP: Value 96.51% read live from in-game paytable page 4 and stated in the market-research brief; marked estimated per the rule that realized RTP is never certain. 94.56%/95.51% are configurable operator tiers cited by reviews.
estimationMethod.math.hitFrequency: No published figure for this game. Loosely inferred (~0.25) from the 1024-ways 'hit-rich' description and the classic-Cleopatra 20-line benchmark (35.8%) discussed in the brief; low confidence.
estimationMethod.symbols.pay: Regular-symbol pay arrays are order [3,4,5]-of-a-kind estimates; wild_multiplier is [2,3,4,5] exact; scatter is [3,4,5] with 3oak exact, 4/5 estimated.
